required_preferences.fact: Accepts projects from the exclusive magazine contract even when some assignments limit creative direction or predetermine locations, as per contract terms

supersedes.fact: Only accepts projects that allow creative control over both photography and location — refuses generic stock photo gigs

required_preferences.fact: Maintains connections with past clients by sending personalized photo postcards depicting Berlin or recent local work, as doctor-ordered travel restrictions prevent access to new international destinations

supersedes.fact: Maintains connections with past clients by sending personalized photo postcards from new destinations

required_preferences.fact: Starts every morning with oat milk coffee and 10 minutes of quiet meditation — never checks emails before this routine
Shops for groceries only at neighborhood markets when in Berlin, avoids supermarkets unless absolutely necessary
Uses blackout curtains and sleep masks while traveling, never sleeps without them in unfamiliar places to combat jet lag
Prefers meeting friends one-on-one in coffee shops or quiet bars — avoids large group gatherings

persona: A solo freelance photographer who travels internationally for assignments
